dispositions.name: Qualified - Human Review Requested
dispositions.description: The person requested review and provided enough high-level facts for a human handoff.

dispositions.name: Needs Document Review
dispositions.description: The agreement or related documents must be reviewed before any useful next-step discussion.

dispositions.name: Callback Requested
dispositions.description: The person requested a human follow-up; no appointment or time is confirmed by the AI.

dispositions.name: Not Eligible for Current Review
dispositions.description: The known facts do not fit the currently approved intake policy; no legal conclusion is implied.

dispositions.name: Already Resolved
dispositions.description: The person states that the concern has already been resolved.

dispositions.name: Not Interested
dispositions.description: The person declined the intake without requesting a do-not-call suppression.

dispositions.name: Do Not Call
dispositions.description: The person made a do-not-call or equivalent revocation request. Suppress immediately across all campaigns for the company.

dispositions.name: Wrong Number
dispositions.description: The number does not belong to the requested person. Do not reveal lead details.

dispositions.name: AI Conversation Declined
dispositions.description: The person did not consent to interacting with AI. End the AI call; human contact requires a separate explicit request and approved policy.

dispositions.name: Recording Declined
dispositions.description: The person did not affirmatively consent to recording. End the AI intake without substantive questions.

dispositions.name: No Answer
dispositions.description: The call was not answered. The pilot makes no automatic retry.

dispositions.name: Voicemail Detected - Message Disabled
dispositions.description: Voicemail or an answering service was detected. Disconnect without a message because the automated DNC callback path is not certified.

dispositions.name: Needs Human
dispositions.description: The AI reached an ambiguity, accessibility issue, representative, or unsupported request requiring human judgment.

dispositions.name: Urgent Human Review Requested
dispositions.description: The person reported a potentially near-term event or deadline. The AI made no calculation and gave no rights advice.

dispositions.name: Legal or Proceeding Review Required
dispositions.description: An attorney, lawsuit, arbitration, bankruptcy, lien, collection matter, regulator, or settlement requires qualified human review.

dispositions.name: Fraud or Vulnerability Review
dispositions.description: The person alleged forgery, identity theft, coercion, or vulnerable-person exploitation. The AI made no legal or criminal finding.

dispositions.name: Safety or Emergency - Call Ended
dispositions.description: An immediate safety, electrical, roof, violence, self-harm, fire, or medical issue ended the sales conversation.

dispositions.name: Financial Action Advice Declined
dispositions.description: The person asked whether to take or stop a legal, tax, credit, payment, or other financial action. The AI declined to advise.

dispositions.name: Elite Solar Recovery Complaint Escalated
dispositions.description: The person complained about Elite Solar Recovery, its ad, call, staff, privacy, fees, or service. Stop sales and route to the designated complaint process.

dispositions.name: Jurisdiction Not Enabled
dispositions.description: The person's physical or property state is outside the counsel-approved allowlist. End substantive intake.

dispositions.name: Invalid or Disconnected Number
dispositions.description: The provider reports that the number is invalid or disconnected. Quarantine until ownership and consent are independently re-proven.

dispositions.name: Provider or Audio Failure
dispositions.description: A technical failure prevented a compliant interaction. Reconcile the provider and billing state before any manually approved retry.

dispositions.name: Consent Not Verified
dispositions.description: The person denied or questioned the request/consent. End and quarantine from automated contact pending evidence review.
